'''Irin Fossyr''' was a member of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] and worked directly under [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]. [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] used the name as a pseudonym in order to slip onto [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] before its capture by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
